---
subtitle: "Assistant Professor in Lifespan Developmental Psychology"
image: "img/stanciu_feb26.png"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 25em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/adrianvstanciu
    - icon: google
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vy80cu8AAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: map
      text: Research Gate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Adrian-Stanciu
  
---

<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-VLRYTQT397"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-VLRYTQT397');
</script>


:::{#hero-heading}

July 2025, Head of institute Lifespan Development, Family and Culture. University of Luxembourg.

September 2023, Assistant professor in lifespan developmental psychologyh (with a focus on adult development and digital technology/ digitalization), University of Luxembourg.

2021-2023, Postdoctoral/ Senior researcher in the ALLBUS team ([German General Social Survey](https://www.gesis.org/en/allbus)) at GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences in Mannheim, Germany. 

2017-2020, Postdoctoral researcher, [Institute for Gerontology](https://www.uni-vechta.de/en/gerontology), at the University of Vechta in Germany. 

2012-2017, PhD studies at Bremen International School of Social Sciences ([BIGSSS](https://www.bigsss-bremen.de/)). The doctoral title was conferred by University of Bremen and Jacobs University Bremen (now Constructor University Bremen).

2009-2012, Research Master's degree in Social Psychology from University of Groningen, the Netherlands.

2006-2009, Sociology at the Bachelor level in Bucharest, Romania. 

I speak Romanian, English and German.

I practice Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (BJJ).

I am a stroke survivor.
::: 

:::{#hero-heading}

## Contact

**Email**: adrian.stanciu[at]uni.lu

**Note**: I will not consider nor respond to unsolicited work inquiries, traineeship and any form of collaboration that involves financial efforts on my part or the institution I represent. For all such collaborations, only applications and requests via the official channels will be considered.

:::
